quality_notes: Include one fenced visual block that matches the planned diagram type.
Keep the post in the LinkedIn sweet spot: roughly 140 to 340 words.

post_text:
Nobody talks about the hidden costs of slow Android app build times 🤔.

I was wrong to think that build times were just a minor inconvenience, but they can actually slow down the entire development cycle 🚀.

1️⃣ The Problem is real

2️⃣ Core Concept is key

3️⃣ How It Works is complex
The fundamental idea behind optimizing Android app build times is to streamline the build process 📈.

I finally understood that a well-optimized build process can save hours of development time 🕒.

6️⃣ Key Takeaway is important
Production systems use a combination of CLI tools and optimized build configurations to achieve faster build times 🚀.

However, most engineers get it wrong by not properly configuring their build scripts 📝.
💬 Which of the following is your biggest challenge?

1️⃣ The Problem 2️⃣ Core Concept 3️⃣ #SystemDesign #ScaleEngineering #DistributedSystems #DistributedSystems #SystemDesign
